heading: Penalties for violations of rules relating to loading and unloading motor vehicles
label: 14905 Penalties for violations of rules relating to loading and unloading motor vehicles
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11902a of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided in , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1996Pub. L. 104–88section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88section 1301 of this title
amendments: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by .section 11902a of this titlePub. L. 104–88, § 102(a)

children.heading: .—Civil Penalties
children.label: a .—Civil Penalties
children.text: Whoever knowingly authorizes, consents to, or permits a violation of subsection (a) or (b) of section 14103 or who knowingly violates subsection (a) of such section is liable to the United States for a civil penalty of not more than $10,000 for each violation.

children.heading: .—Criminal Penalties
children.label: b .—Criminal Penalties
children.text: Whoever knowingly violates shall be fined under title 18 or imprisoned not more than 2 years, or both.section 14103(b) of this title
